mapper.select: SELECT * FROM teams WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM teams ORDER BY id
SELECT t.* FROM teams t INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = t.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.approval_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY t.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teams (name, goal, announcement, status, manager_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{goal}, #{announcement}, #{status}, #{managerId})
